column.text:
• New York Mets placed 1B Jorge Polanco on the 60-day injured list with a right wrist contusion.
• Kansas City Royals placed RHP Carlos Estévez on the 60-day injured list with a left foot contusion.
• Texas Rangers placed SS Corey Seager on the 7-day injured list with a concussion.
• Los Angeles Angels placed RHP Grayson Rodriguez on the 15-day injured list with low back inflammation.
• Minnesota Twins designated SS Orlando Arcia for assignment.
• Los Angeles Angels designated LHP Drew Pomeranz for assignment.
• Chicago Cubs designated LHP Doug Nikhazy for assignment.
• Kansas City Royals traded RHP Denis Samudio and cash to the Toronto Blue Jays for RHP Connor Seab

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
